prompt: Create a dramatic square-format anime illustration of a pale elven cyborg girl in extreme close-up, shown from the shoulders up against a deep black abstract ink background. She has very light icy blue-white messy shoulder-length hair with many loose strands, heavy black ink linework, and one long sharp pointed elf ear extending horizontally to the left, with small mechanical details near the ear. Her face is intentionally obscured by a large vertical rounded-rectangle censor block in flat cool light gray, centered over the entire face from the forehead down past the chin, hiding all facial features. Her neck, collarbone, and upper chest are exposed and transformed into intricate black biomechanical circuitry, cables, armor-like fragments, and organic machine patterns over pale skin. Use a high-contrast monochrome manga style with icy blue highlights, scratchy brush strokes, splattered ink, rough hand-drawn contours, dense black shadows, and a gritty cyberpunk dark-fantasy mood. The composition should crop tightly around the head and shoulders, with the elf ear and hair filling the frame, no text, no border, no additional characters.
